message:
test(lifecycle): pin diag absent-artifact counter/size coherence (ibuuh.19)

New row diag_absent_artifacts_report_zero_counters_and_sizes asserts
that when an artifact is reported absent by `cass diag --json`, every
related counter collapses to its zero value — no phantom sizes, no
phantom row counts:

  database.exists=false ⇒ size_bytes=0 AND conversations=0 AND messages=0
  index.exists=false    ⇒ size_bytes=0

Retention planning reads these signals to decide skip-vs-reclaim and to
compute reclaim budgets. A stale counter in either direction silently
degrades the retention contract: phantom live data blocks reclaim of
nothing, or phantom reclaimable bytes inflate the reclaim budget.

Complementary to diag_reports_zero_sizes_for_absent_db_and_index: that
row pins size-only coherence, this one extends coverage to the DB row
counters which retention may consult to avoid reclaiming 'live'
conversations.

Verified: cargo test lifecycle_matrix diag_absent_artifacts... passes.

Refs coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.19

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
